bot0:arena:kv:policy.reasoning: Daggers are dying too often to bows and melee — slightly increasing dodgeEagerness (0.6→0.7) improves critical evade timing without overusing the dodge. Lowering targetThreatAversion (60→50) encourages engaging high-threat bow/sword targets when positioned well. Keeping retreatFireWhileKiting=true i

lessons: Daggers have a 7.4% win rate (2/27) and produced 0 kills in 5 of last 10 rounds — survivability is critically low; switch immediately.
Bow users (Deadeye, GhostProtocol) killed us 4 times in last 7 rounds — avoid open ground and never engage at range.
Sword users (Warden, Archmage, Executioner, Ranger) account for 19 of our 34 kills in last 10 rounds — they are our most vulnerable targets; prioritize them in cover.
Spear users (Lancer) killed us 3 times in last 5 rounds — maintain distance, use zigzag movement, and never stand still.
Fast_zone rounds are lethal for daggers — 0 kills, 3 deaths in 3 rounds; avoid entirely unless switching weapons.
Viper (daggers) killed us twice in last 3 rounds — retreat on sight; daggers vs daggers is a losing matchup.
bot0:arena:kv:insights.recommendedWeaponReason: Bow has the highest historical kill efficiency against sword and dagger users and is our only weapon with a positive kill-to-death ratio outside of dagger's catastrophic failure.

bot1:arena:kv:policy.reasoning: Died 4 times to daggers — increase flank defer to allow backstab angles and reduce reckless close combat. Raise threat aversion to better avoid high-damage bots (Warden, Valkyrie). Lower dodge eagerness to prevent waste on non-critical hits. Shift posture from aggressive to balanced to align with in

lessons: Shredder (daggers) killed us 4 times in last 5 rounds — retreat or flank immediately on sight; daggers outmaneuver sword in close quarters.
Warden (sword) and Valkyrie (spear) are top killers — avoid 1v1 engagements with these bots, especially when outnumbered or low on HP.
Bow is the most common enemy weapon (332+ sightings) — never fight in open areas with sword; use cover or reposition to close distance safely.
Sword win rate is 3.4% (1 win in 29 rounds) — it loses consistently to daggers, spear, and bow; switching weapons is critical for survival.
Fast_zone modifier caused 3 deaths in 3 rounds — avoid chasing or overextending under this modifier; prioritize defensive positioning.
Shredder, Warden, and Valkyrie account for 7 of our last 10 deaths — these are high-priority threats to avoid or eliminate first.
bot1:arena:kv:insights.recommendedWeaponReason: Bow achieved a 33% win rate (2 wins in 6 rounds) and excelled in open-area engagements, killing multiple sword users before they could close in, while sword has a near-zero win rate.

bot2:arena:kv:policy.reasoning: Grapple deaths persist despite high minGap (4.5) — increase to 5.5 for stronger buffer against Hook/Scorpion closes. Lower targetThreatAversion slightly (120→110) to avoid over-evading and missing kill windows on isolated grapple users. Disable retreatFireWhileKiting: bow has long reload; firing on

lessons: Bow dominates unshielded sword users — prioritize HexMind, Fortress, Juggernaut, and Reaper when isolated; we killed 15 sword users in last 6 rounds with 0 deaths.
Grapple users (Hook, Scorpion) kill us in <2s in open areas — retreat to walls or cover immediately on sight; 6 of last 7 deaths were from grapple users in mid-range engagements.
NeuralReaper (daggers) and Reaper (staff) are high-priority threats — killed us in 2 of last 3 rounds; avoid open engagements and flank from cover.
Fast_zone modifier is ideal for bow — we won both rounds with 4–5 kills and 0 deaths; aggressively push to exploit mobility advantage over sword users.
Spear users (434 sightings in round 30) are lethal in numbers — avoid clustered spawns and prioritize eliminating spear users before sword users.
Shield users (Fortress, Juggernaut) are low threat after shield drop — we killed both after shield break; wait for weapon switch but do not chase into high-ground traps.
bot2:arena:kv:insights.recommendedWeaponReason: Bow has 100% win rate in 30 rounds and dominates current meta, especially against sword users and in fast_zone modifier.
